title: World Skate Games 2024 – Inline Speed
title_zh: 世界轮滑运动会2024——速度轮滑
summary_en: Overview of inline speed skating competitions at World Skate Games 2024 in Italy, with schedule, context and links to live coverage/results.
summary_zh: 世界轮滑运动会2024意大利站的速度轮滑赛事综述，包含赛程、背景与直播/成绩入口。
best_quote_en: The World Skate Games 2024 have kicked off with high energy speed skating competitions.
best_quote_zh: 2024年世界轮滑运动会的速度轮滑赛事已在高能氛围中拉开帷幕。

title: World Skate Games 2024 – Results Hub
title_zh: 世界轮滑运动会2024——官方成绩页
summary_en: Centralized results for all WSG 2024 disciplines, including Speed, Inline Slalom, Roller Freestyle and more.
summary_zh: WSG 2024各项目官方成绩汇总入口，涵盖速度轮滑、绕桩、自由式等。

title: World Skate Marathon Tour (WSMT)
title_zh: 世界轮滑马拉松巡回赛（WSMT）
summary_en: WSMT is the official global inline marathon series for pros, masters, and amateurs; first edition launched in 2024.
summary_zh: WSMT是官方全球直排轮马拉松系列赛，面向职业、大师及大众组，2024年启动首届赛季。
best_quote_en: The World Skate Marathon Tour is the official open worldwide inline skating marathon series.
best_quote_zh: 世界轮滑马拉松巡回赛是官方面向全球的直排轮马拉松系列赛。

title: BMW Berlin Marathon – Inline Skating
title_zh: 柏林马拉松——直排轮滑组
summary_en: Race-day info for the world’s largest inline marathon: start times, course location and logistics.
summary_zh: 全球规模最大的轮滑马拉松之一，含起跑时间、路线与现场安排等关键信息。
best_quote_en: The inline skaters bring plenty of speed to the streets of Berlin.
best_quote_zh: 直排轮滑选手为柏林街道带来十足速度感。

title: World Inline Cup (WIC) – Marathon Series
title_zh: 世界直排轮杯（WIC）——马拉松系列
summary_en: Since 2000, WIC has been a premier international marathon series in Europe and Asia, uniting elites and fitness skaters.
summary_zh: 自2000年起，WIC成为横跨欧亚的顶级轮滑马拉松系列赛，汇聚职业与健身滑手。
best_quote_en: The WORLD INLINE CUP is since 2000 the highest international marathon series for inline speed skaters.
best_quote_zh: 自2000年起，WIC一直是速度轮滑最高级别的国际马拉松系列赛。

title: 24H Rollers – Le Mans Circuit
summary_en: Iconic 24-hour relay/endurance event at the Le Mans circuit for individuals and teams, plus expo and side activities.
summary_zh: 在勒芒赛道进行的标志性24小时接力/耐力活动，可个人或团队参赛，并配套展会与活动。
best_quote_en: 24h Rollers on the Le Mans Circuit.
best_quote_zh: 勒芒赛道上的24小时轮滑。

title: GENERALI Berlin Half Marathon – Inline
title_zh: 柏林半程马拉松——轮滑组
summary_en: Inline half marathon through Berlin’s landmarks with registration windows and course highlights.
summary_zh: 穿越柏林地标的轮滑半马，包含报名时间窗与路线亮点。
best_quote_en: Berlin's landmarks whiz by on the super-fast half-marathon course.
best_quote_zh: 在超快的半马赛道上，柏林地标从身旁呼啸而过。

title: Winterclash – Aggressive Inline
summary_en: One of the most influential aggressive inline contests with divisions, schedule and community activities.
summary_zh: 最具影响力的极限直排轮赛事之一，设有多个组别、完整日程与社区活动。

title: Blading Cup – Street Contest Series
summary_en: US street-focused contest series with pro/am divisions and annual schedule in Santa Ana and abroad.
summary_zh: 以街式为核心的美国赛事系列，设有职业/业余组，常年在圣安娜等地举办。

title: World Slalom Series (WSSA) – Official Tour
title_zh: 世界绕桩系列赛（WSSA）——官方巡回
summary_en: Official tour for freestyle and speed slalom with rankings, results and news.
summary_zh: 自由式与速度绕桩的官方巡回平台，提供排名、成绩与新闻。
best_quote_en: Freestyle Slalom and Speed Slalom Official World Tour.
best_quote_zh: 自由式与速度绕桩的官方世界巡回赛。

title: Trinity 3-Point Mount – Tech Insight
title_zh: Trinity 三点安装——技术解析
summary_en: Explains the Trinity 3-point boot-to-frame mounting: lower center of gravity, better power transfer and stability.
summary_zh: 解读Trinity三点安装的优势：更低重心、更佳传力与稳定性。
best_quote_en: Trinity is our patented 3-point mounting system.
best_quote_zh: Trinity 是我们的三点专利安装系统。

title: Inline Wheel Buying Guide
title_zh: 直排轮滑轮子选购指南
summary_en: Covers wheel diameter, hardness (durometer) and profiles for different skating styles (indoor, outdoor, fitness, etc.).
summary_zh: 讲解轮径、硬度（邵氏A）与轮型，适配室内/室外、健身等不同使用场景。
best_quote_en: Hardness ratings are typically 76A–80A for indoor skating.
best_quote_zh: 室内轮常见硬度通常在 76A–80A。

title: Bearing Basics & Ratings (ABEC/ILQ/SG)
summary_en: Explains common rating systems and why comparisons are best made within the same brand.
summary_zh: 介绍常见评级体系，并说明不同品牌间的ABEC数字不可直接横向对比。
best_quote_en: ABEC, ILQ & SG ratings will range on a scale from 1–9.
best_quote_zh: ABEC、ILQ与SG等评级通常以1到9表示。

title: Rockering Guide – Setup & Handling
summary_en: Practical how-to on front/flat/full rocker to change maneuverability and stability for urban or slalom use.
summary_zh: 讲解前摇、全摇与平架设定，如何提升灵活性与稳定性，适合城市/绕桩需求。
best_quote_en: To ‘front rocker’ your skates, replace your front wheel with one that is a little smaller.
best_quote_zh: 要做“前摇”，把最前面的轮子换成更小一号即可。

title: Inline Skate Wheels Guide
summary_en: Covers wheel size, hardness (durometer), and profile for different skating styles such as fitness, urban, and racing.
summary_zh: 讲解轮径、硬度（邵氏A）和轮型，适配健身、城市和竞速等不同滑行需求。
best_quote_en: Larger wheels (100mm–125mm) are faster but harder to maneuver.
best_quote_zh: 大直径轮子（100–125mm）速度更快，但灵活性降低。

title: Bearing Basics & Ratings
summary_en: Explains ABEC, ILQ, and SG rating systems, lubrication types, and tips for extending bearing life.
summary_zh: 解释 ABEC、ILQ、SG 等评级体系，润滑方式及延长轴承寿命的技巧。
best_quote_en: ABEC ratings measure precision, not speed; maintenance matters more.
best_quote_zh: ABEC 等级衡量的是精度而非速度，保养更为关键。

title: Inline Skate Frames – Materials & Mounting
summary_en: Overview of frame types (aluminum, carbon), lengths, and the Trinity 3-point mounting system.
summary_zh: 概述支架材质（铝合金、碳纤维）、长度及 Trinity 三点安装系统。
best_quote_en: A longer frame gives more stability, while a shorter frame increases maneuverability.
best_quote_zh: 长支架更稳定，短支架更灵活。

title: Inline Skate Hardware – Screws & Spacers
summary_en: Describes common axle bolts, frame screws, spacers and maintenance practices for safe skating.
summary_zh: 介绍常见的车轴螺丝、支架螺丝、垫片及安全维护方法。
best_quote_en: Always tighten screws evenly and check them before every ride.
best_quote_zh: 每次滑行前都要检查并均匀拧紧螺丝。

title: Speed Skates – Boots & Setup
summary_en: Covers carbon boots, low-cut designs for ankle mobility, and wheel/frame setups for racing.
summary_zh: 介绍碳纤维鞋壳、低帮设计（增加脚踝活动）以及竞速用轮架组合。
best_quote_en: Speed skates prioritize efficiency and power transfer over comfort.
best_quote_zh: 速滑鞋注重效率与力量传导，而非舒适度。
